nonduplicate_basis: state-conditioned sleeve allocation with portfolio drawdown hysteresis; no inverse-volatility risk-budget weights

signals.known_information: prior trading-day close and earlier only
signals.equity_state: 510300 adjusted close above its trailing 120-observation simple moving average
signals.relative_selection: within each sleeve rank trailing adjusted-close return over the frozen lookback
signals.drawdown_state: flow-adjusted portfolio NAV drawdown computed through prior close
signals.hysteresis: risk reduction enters at frozen drawdown threshold and exits only after frozen recovery threshold

allocation.risk_on: top equity plus top defensive asset at frozen equity/defensive split
allocation.risk_off: top defensive asset plus cash at frozen defensive cap
allocation.suspended_or_missing: retain existing holding; missed target capital remains cash and is not redistributed

execution.rebalance: first common trading day of each month at official raw next open
execution.company_actions: official record-date entitlement, pay-date cash, effective-date share factor
execution.fees: frozen project ETF fee and slippage configuration
execution.futures_overlay: optional frozen one-contract IH/IF/IC/IM trend overlay only after shared-cash NAV and margin gates; separate evidence tier

data_gate: official canonical full history, calendar, suspension rows and complete point-in-time company-action lineage for all four ETFs
